channel.title: NPR Programs: Morning Edition
channel.description: Morning Edition takes listeners around the country and the world with multi-faceted stories and commentaries every weekday. Hosts Steve Inskeep, Leila Fadel, Michel Martin and A Martínez bring you the latest breaking news and features to prepare you for the day.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Trump defends Iran strikes, offers objectives for military operation
item.description: His remarks are the first public ones to reporters since the U.S.-Israeli military operation against Iran began Saturday despite weeks of talks designed to stave off a conflict.
item.content:encoded:
His remarks are the first public ones to reporters since the U.S.-Israeli military operation against Iran began Saturday despite weeks of talks designed to stave off a conflict.

(Image credit: Andrew Harnik)
item.dc:creator: NPR Washington Desk

item.title: Trump says more American troops will 'likely' die in war against Iran
item.description: President Trump in a video address posted online lays out few details about the U.S.'s objectives in its war with Iran, but says more U.S. service members may die before the conflict is over.
item.content:encoded: President Trump in a video address posted online lays out few details about the U.S.'s objectives in its war with Iran, but says more U.S. service members may die before the conflict is over.
item.dc:creator: Franco Ordoñez

item.title: Rep. Adam Smith on the U.S. strikes on Iran and the debate over Trump's war powers
item.description: NPR's Leila Fadel asks Democratic Rep. Adam Smith of Washington, the ranking member on the House Armed Services Committee, about President Trump's unilateral authorization to strike Iran.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Leila Fadel asks Democratic Rep. Adam Smith of Washington, the ranking member on the House Armed Services Committee, about President Trump's unilateral authorization to strike Iran.
item.dc:creator: Leila Fadel

item.title: Here's what we know about how the U.S. war with Iran is impacting oil and gas markets
item.description: The U.S. war with Iran poses serious risks to global energy markets. It's impacting flows of oil as well as liquified natural gas.
item.content:encoded: The U.S. war with Iran poses serious risks to global energy markets. It's impacting flows of oil as well as liquified natural gas.
item.dc:creator: Julia Simon

item.title: Got elbow or heel pain? Shockwave therapy can help
item.description: As more people stay active as they age, overuse injuries are increasing. A non-invasive treatment known as shockwave therapy can help ease heel and elbow pain. Here's how.
item.content:encoded:
As more people stay active as they age, overuse injuries are increasing. A non-invasive treatment known as shockwave therapy can help ease heel and elbow pain. Here's how.

(Image credit: Narongrit Doungmanee)
item.dc:creator: Allison Aubrey

item.title: Supreme Court ponders law making it a crime for marijuana users to own guns
item.description: The law, the same one used to prosecute Joe Biden's son for illegal gun possession, has united an array of strange bedfellows, from conservative gun rights groups to liberal civil liberties groups.
item.content:encoded:
The law, the same one used to prosecute Joe Biden's son for illegal gun possession, has united an array of strange bedfellows, from conservative gun rights groups to liberal civil liberties groups.

(Image credit: Heather Diehl)
item.dc:creator: Nina Totenberg

item.title: Morning news brief
item.description: U.S. and Israel continue attacks against Iran, three American service members killed and Trump says more deaths are "likely," Iran targets Gulf states and U.S. bases as retaliation.
item.content:encoded: U.S. and Israel continue attacks against Iran, three American service members killed and Trump says more deaths are "likely," Iran targets Gulf states and U.S. bases as retaliation.
item.dc:creator: A Martínez

item.title: War with Iran strands hundreds of thousands of travelers across the Middle East
item.description: Hundreds of thousands of travelers have been stranded by the outbreak of war with Iran.
item.content:encoded: Hundreds of thousands of travelers have been stranded by the outbreak of war with Iran.
item.dc:creator: Hosts

item.title: Millions of Israelis take shelter as Iran launches retaliatory attacks
item.description: Millions of Israelis have sought safety in shelters after Iran launched retaliatory attacks on Israeli cities following the death of Iran's supreme leader.
item.content:encoded: Millions of Israelis have sought safety in shelters after Iran launched retaliatory attacks on Israeli cities following the death of Iran's supreme leader.
item.dc:creator: Daniel Estrin

item.title: Iranian Americans react to U.S.-Israeli strikes in Iran
item.description: Members of the Iranian diaspora in Los Angeles react to the war between Iran, the U.S. and Israel.
item.content:encoded: Members of the Iranian diaspora in Los Angeles react to the war between Iran, the U.S. and Israel.
item.dc:creator: Kelly McEvers
